action.reasoning: Observation: After 375 epochs, best val MAE = 2.6830, mae_60min = 3.3732 (new best). Loss still slowly declining at ~0.214. With 1.0h remaining and 19 iterations left. Analysis: The model is converging slowly. Last 75-epoch run took ~21 min. I have time for one more training run. The improvements are getting smaller but still happening. Decision: Train 50 more epochs from best checkpoint with very low LR (1e-4 cosine to 1e-6) to fine-tune. This should take ~14 min. Then submit eval.
